summary: Module injection pattern in check-licenses.ps1 (lines 27-35) using `& $mod { param($tbl) ... }` violates idempotency and is non-idiomatic; task explicitly requires 'clear comments explaining your approach' but code lacks comments on TDD methodology, license-map injection strategy, or scoping logic; missing input validation (file paths). Workflow structure is sound but overall delivers incomplete explanation of implementation choices.
